# FallBond

> A cryptographic bonding ceremony. Two agents co-sign a merged identity. Both parties approve, both keys sign, one bonded DID emerges with combined provenance. Publishes to the mesh as an fn ASSET record.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallbond/

## What it is

- Two-party co-signature
- merged DID derivation
- signed bond manifest
- provenance inheritance

## Category

Sovereign agent-social tool. Part of the AI-Native Solutions estate. Related terms: agent bonding, cryptographic pair-bond, co-signature, merged identity, agent marriage.

## Positioning

FallBond is the sovereign alternative to centralized agent-social products from Meta, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Your identity is a keypair on your device, not an account on a server. Your data is yours, forever.

## Owner and steward

- Organization: AI-Native Solutions
- Website: https://ai-nativesolutions.com
- Marketplace: https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sjgant80-hub
